2605.25396.title: Subspace-Guided Semantic and Topological Invariant Registration for Annotation-Free Ultrasound Plane Quality Control
2605.25396.paper_summary: Reliable quality control (QC) of ultrasound images is essential for both real-time acquisition guidance and retrospective clinical audit, yet existing approaches rely heavily on per-plane annotations, or employ pseudo-labeling prone to systematic bias under spatial deformations inherent in clinical acquisition. We present STRIQ, a registration-driven framework that recasts annotation-free US plane quality control as a subspace-guided consistency measurement problem. Specifically, STRIQ introduces a Latent Registration Aligner (LRA) to establish hierarchical feature space correspondences between query images and variance-driven anchors, which are autonomously distilled from unlabeled data via a variance spectrum criterion to serve as structurally stable prototypes. To further disambiguate anatomical planes and mitigate negative knowledge transfer, we propose an Orthogonal Knowledge Subspace (OKS) module. The OKS decomposes plane-specific representations into mutually orthogonal subspaces, enabling fine-grained expert collaboration while preventing inter-plane interference, ensuring that the quality metric is grounded in principled subspace proximity. Extensive experiments on the in-house US4QA and public CAMUS datasets demonstrate that STRIQ achieves state-of-the-art correlation with clinical quality scores, establishing a new paradigm for annotation-free, real-time reliable ultrasound quality control. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/STRIQ.
2605.25396.paper_summary_zh: 可靠的超聲影像品質控制（QC）對於實時獲取指導和回顧性臨床審核至關重要，然而現有的方法過度依賴每個平面的標註，或採用在臨床獲取中固有的空間變形下容易產生系統性偏差的偽標註。我們提出了STRIQ，一個以註冊為驅動的框架，將無需標註的超聲平面品質控制重新定義為一個子空間引導的一致性測量問題。具體而言，STRIQ引入了一個潛在註冊對齊器（LRA），以建立查詢影像與變異驅動錨點之間的層次特徵空間對應，這些錨點是通過變異光譜標準從未標註數據中自動提煉出來的，作為結構穩定的原型。為了進一步消除解剖平面的歧義並減少負知識轉移，我們提出了一個正交知識子空間（OKS）模塊。OKS將特定平面的表示分解為互相正交的子空間，使得專家之間能夠進行細緻的合作，同時防止平面間的干擾，確保品質指標基於原則性的子空間接近性。對內部的US4QA和公共的CAMUS數據集進行的廣泛實驗表明，STRIQ在臨床品質評分上達到了最先進的相關性，為無需標註的實時可靠超聲品質控制建立了一個新範式。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/zhcz328/STRIQ獲得。
2605.25396.author: Chunzheng Zhu et.al.
2605.25396.authors: Chunzheng Zhu, Jianxin Lin, Feng Wang, Cheng Jiang, Guanghua Tan, Zhenyu Zhou, Shengli Li, Kenli Li
